race.comment: MISS FARNAN (6) wasted no time getting off the mark as favourite on debut over 1000m at Canberra on Dec 28 and has not appeared since. Strips fitter for two sharp trials in town and looks a promising type that can return with a bang. ZOUTEMPUS (1) has been less effective in his last two but has prior form that stacks right up. Is unbeaten over this course and distance and deserves another chance. MOLTEUNO (7) was a tough all the way winner here two back but failed to go on with it last time at Gundagai. Peak fitness now and is expected to give his backers a sight. DUBBO BOY (2) returns and has peaks that measure up. Draws well for Heywood on the home track. Have to include.
